subject: a humanoid figure in dark armor standing on rocky terrain, holding a small curved blade, with a flag in the distance
description: A humanoid figure stands on a rocky promontory in a three-quarter stance. The figure wears form-fitting dark armor with long hair and holds a small curved blade clearly visible in one hand. In the mid-distance to the left, a large flag or banner is visible. The background is a misty, dramatic sky with hazy landmasses or cliffs. The composition emphasizes the figure's readiness on the frontier.
foreground: armored humanoid figure holding a curved blade on rocky terrain
background: misty sky, hazy cliffs, banner visible
